hero.title: The Ultimate Platform for
hero.subtitle: Mus Tournaments
hero.desc: Professional bracket management, create and manage your mus tournaments quickly and easily. Completely FREE.

features.title: Everything you need to manage your mus tournaments
features.desc: From creation to awards ceremony, Mus Manager has it all covered.

banner.desc: Mus Manager is not just an application; it is the ultimate ally to safeguard the essence of Mus while embracing modernity. Our platform is born from the real need of organizers: to leave behind the chaos of infinite spreadsheets, lost papers, and endless WhatsApp threads. Whether you manage a small neighborhood club, a flash tournament among friends, or a large professional league with hundreds of participants, Mus Manager offers you a centralized, robust, and elegant environment. Everything you need —tournaments, player records, live results, and historical standings— is now in the palm of your hand, accessible from anywhere and optimized for every device. It's time for you to worry only about what matters: betting 'envido' and enjoying the game.

management.title: Organize tournaments effortlessly
management.desc: Create tournaments in minutes, define phases, pair teams, and track every match in real-time. No errors, no paper, no chaos.
points: Comprehensive management of knockouts and leagues
Automatic generation of brackets and matchups
Full control of tables and timing

registration.title: Your community, well managed
registration.desc: Register teams and pairs, check who participates in each tournament, and always have the history at hand. Perfect from a small social group to a club with hundreds of members.
points: Management of teams and regular pairs

results.title: Rankings always up to date
results.desc: Standings update automatically after each result. All participants can consult them at any time, from any device.

how_it_works.title: How it works?
how_it_works.step1_desc: Sign up, name your group, and start adding players. Your community is ready to play in less than five minutes.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Define the format (league or knockout), add participating teams, and Mus Manager generates the bracket automatically.
how_it_works.step3_desc: After each match, enter the score from any mobile or tablet. Standings are updated instantly.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Your players can follow the standings in real-time and review the tournament history without installing anything.

cta.title: Ready to deal the cards?
cta.desc: Join hundreds of organizers who are already saving time and creating better experiences for their players.
cta.note: No credit card required. Setup in 2 minutes.

dashboard.subtitle: Tournaments
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back, {name}. You have {count} events under your management.
dashboard.empty_subtitle: Start your legacy as a Mus Manager organizer today.

footer.desc: The leading tournament management platform for the competitive Mus community. Precision, elegance, and passion.
